metadata.name: PixlFlippr #104
metadata.description:
PixlFlippr is an offshoot of my "Simple Harmonic Motion" series, inspired by the complexity of life emerging through the interaction of simple 'dumb' behaviors, with intricate details emerging on multiple scales. PixlFlippr operates on a pixel level (in the form of a GLSL frag shader).

Every pixel oscillates at a single fixed frequency, slightly out-of-sync with its neighbors. There is no explicit pixel-neighborhood communication (as there would be in eg Cellular Automata), and every pixel acts autonomously, oblivious to its surroundings. Yet collectively, the entire system exhibits constantly evolving complex high level behavior on many scales, ranging from patterns & behaviors spanning a few pixels, all the way up to the level of the entire image. These are further amplified through the emergent pixel aliasing artefacts & moiré patterns. 

Also, it's trippy af. 

PS All generative mints are a seamless loop with a loop duration ranging from a few minutes to over an hour. So stick around & watch it mutate!

metadata.name: Retro #4
metadata.description:
Create your own retro visual. Here is generative pieces creating a grid with colorful gradients 
The size, position and frequency of the grid are generated for each token, along with the color theme.  
Movements and positions are generated by a noise and a seed, it’s the same for each view.

On live version the visual fit your screen.  You can click to play the animation.  You can use the export menu to save a png with the dimensions of your choice.

Shortcuts :
	- click to play/pause the animation
	- On live version : press ‘e’ or ‘m’ to open the export menu
	- press ‘f’ to launch the fullscreen mode
	- On live version : press ‘h’ to hide the cursor

Features :
    - 10 color themes : Copper, Galaxy, Reflection, Future, Old School, Autumn, Northern Lights, Sea, Forest, Gold.
    - Gap : has gap between columns or rows 
    - Cols & rows number

Created by Quentin Hocdé, in Brussels (Belgium).

metadata.name: The beginning #493
metadata.description:
Introduction collection, free to mint.

Main futures:
3 color palettes - Space, Warm, Winter.
26 outer shapes.

Enjoy

metadata.name: Balance #90
metadata.description:
Balance is a project made in 3 days while trying to find my own balance.
Made with p5.js;

Main Features:
- 8 color palettes.
- 2 sun types.
- 2 Waves.
- 2 Textures.
- 2 Outer shapes.

metadata.name: GEN XYZ Das Occult #373
metadata.description:
A 10k Generative Profile Pic collection
GEN XYZ Das Occult - by culla - @tamccullough

move over cryptopunks
there is a new group on the scene

100% code - not an image composition

A bunch of common palettes
A selection of rare palettes
And a smaller set of ultra rare palettes
However, rarity will be based on what combinations the code produces

The majority of tokens will not have a special trait
However your token might have one or even multiple special traits
But, be aware that only the last special trait added will be listed in the features

Even then, look closely, because not all aspects of the canvas are included in the features. Collectors should still look closely and choose what they like when buying on secondary.

Which team are you on? X or O?

follow culla on twitter for updates. Or maybe __acolyte__

If the non reserved tokens mint out quickly, Access List mints will have 24 hours to mint reserves assigned to those wallets

Thank you for supporting an emerging artist in the generative art space

Access List reserves were given to holders of the following PFP collections created by culla
2x for each Basqunk held
1x for each Inkspunk, TwoFourQunk, V0iD, DeeManz, Punkasso and CR0$$KULL
You would have needed to transfer the above tokens to your mint wallet at the time of the snapshot

share your tokens on social media with #genxyznft
Made with love by culla using p5.js

metadata.name: Pipes  #54
metadata.description:
In his 2023 book, 'The Beauty of Play', Frank Lantz writes, 'Games are an aesthetic form. Which is to say they are something we do for their own sake, in search of beauty, pleasure and meaning, a realm in which our subjective tastes and individual experiences are joined together into communities of critical judgement and overlapping but contested values'.



'Pipes' is a reimagining of the game 'Pipe Mania', released in 1990 by Empire Software. While in the original game, the aim for the player is to connect a series of randomly generated pipe pieces to ensure the flow of 'goo' for a specified distance, in 'Pipes', unique left-to right-pathways are generated section by section.



By refiguring this game and its components into a generative collection, 'Pipes' forms a part of an overarching series, 'The Art of Play', which seeks to highlight the aesthetic beauty of early gaming software.

metadata.name: Puzzles & Mysteries #73
metadata.description:
Nothing is true to reality about this piece.
Not the sky, nor the hills and definitely not the colors. 
It’s all about getting lost in a place we don’t know - A puzzle, a mystery and collecting the missing pieces.

Press “s” to save as png.

Made with p5js;

metadata.name: Pashut #103
metadata.description:
Random description about a random cube.

After fully loaded:
Press 's' to save as png.
Press 'r' to rotate the canvas.

Main features:
-Color palette 
-Background style
-Cubes style
-Cubes count

Created using p5js;

metadata.name: House of Birds #37
metadata.description:
"House of Birds" started as a few origami birds inside a frame.
But, birds don't need boundaries; birds need trees, hills, and sky.

Created using p5js;

Press "s" to save as png.

Twitter: @SapirCohen__
